mano_cua.result_summary: Markdown 编辑器功能正常。输入包含多级标题、表格、有序/无序列表、代码块的复杂文档后，右侧预览区域完整渲染所有元素，无空白或中断。Console 无 JavaScript 错误。复制按钮功能正常，提示已复制到剪贴板。仅 Issues 面板有一个低级可访问性建议（表单元素缺 id/name），非运行时错误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All Markdown elements rendered correctly in preview. No JavaScript errors in Console. Copy button works with success toast. Only minor accessibility suggestion in Issues panel (form field missing id/name). All functionality working as expected.
